permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Opens a WebSocket to the user-configured OpenClaw Gateway setup URL for sessions, voice, and canvas.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Captures Even G2 microphone audio for OpenClaw voice input.

permissions.name: location
permissions.desc: Reads a one-shot phone location only when OpenClaw invokes the Even G2 node location.get command.

permissions.name: camera
permissions.desc: Scans the user-owned OpenClaw Gateway setup QR code during initial setup and recovery.
